_doc: Static file inventory for the diversity atlas. Two cohorts of files: (A) the in-repo bulk snapshot + 4 optional payloads that ship inside data/ — round-1 carve-from-manuscript path, NOT a real pipeline output; (B) the on-disk pipeline outputs under master_config roots `diversity_*` (added 2026-05-20). The shell uses (A) for the existing data_loader.js path and (B) for packaging / integrity checks / dev tooling listings. Layer-level wiring for (B) lives in layers.registry.json.

embedded_tables._doc: Single JSON with all 37 dt_* blobs from Diversity_atlas.html v2.4. Loaded once by shared/data_loader.js. NOT registered as a layer — accessed by the JS loader directly.

texture_metrics._doc: Per-sample texture metrics consumed by page9. Round-2 ships an empty stub; the full payload is emitted by catfish-diversity-analysis phase_2_discovery/04_window_H_and_DDI.sh and contains: params{}, cohort_summary{}, per_sample[] (sample, h_gw, ddi, chi_min, chi_min_chr, chi_min_pos, median_H_w, mad_H_w), windows{ chroms[], cohort_median_H_w[], cohort_q25_H_w[], cohort_q75_H_w[] }, per_sample_H_w{ sample_id: [H_w per window] }. Estimated full size ~25 MB at 50 kb windows × 226 samples; consider parquet/binary if it grows beyond browser-comfort range. Loaded by shared/data_loader.js in parallel with embedded_tables; a missing file resolves to null and page9 renders the 'data pending' card.

functional_burden._doc: Functional burden / selection efficacy payload consumed by page10. Round-3 ships an empty stub; full payload is emitted by the upstream pipeline running bcftools csq + snpEff + VESM + custom splice module. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_functional_burden.md §4. Loaded by shared/data_loader.js; absent → page10 'data pending' card.

roh_gene_overlap._doc: ROH × gene-model intersection product consumed by the page5 extension. Round-3 ships an empty stub. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_roh_gene_burden.md §4 + §5.

divergence_network._doc: Pairwise group-divergence network payload consumed by page11. Round-3 ships an empty stub. Schema in SPEC_2026-05-12_divergence_network.md §4.

files._section_2: ==== On-disk pipeline outputs (under master_config roots diversity_*) ====
files._section_2_doc: Paths below use {root}/<sub> notation; resolve through master_config.yaml > roots.<root_name> at runtime. Each entry mirrors a layer in layers.registry.json. Edit master_config.yaml to relocate the entire family.

diversity_genomewide_het_tsv._doc: Per-sample genome-wide H from realSFS folded SFS. Backs samples_genomewide_het layer.

diversity_sfs_per_sample._doc: Per-sample folded 1-D SFS. Backs samples_sfs layer.

diversity_ancestry_het_tables._doc: Per-K × cohort stratified tests. Eleven test families × 11 K × 2 cohorts ≈ 242 files. Backs ancestry_het_* per-K layers in layers.registry.json.

diversity_ancestry_het_aggregates._doc: Cross-K aggregates — single files, no template. Backs ancestry_het_*_all + cleaned_* + pruned81 layers.

diversity_theta_pi_pestpg._doc: ANGSD doThetaStat per-window output, 4 scales × 226 samples = 904 files. Backs samples_theta_pi_pestpg layer.

diversity_saf_arg._doc: ANGSD command-line provenance log per sample. NB: the SAF binaries themselves (.saf.idx / .saf.gz / .saf.pos.gz) are not present on E:/results_diversity/01_saf_per_sample/ — only the .arg log files were mirrored from LANTA. See MISSING_DATA.md §1.

diversity_roh_pending._doc: diversity_roh root is currently EMPTY on disk. Layer entries (samples_roh_per_sample, cohort_froh_per_chrom, cohort_roh_length_bins) are declared in layers.registry.json with disabled: true so the wiring is ready when the pipeline ships. See MISSING_DATA.md §2.

diversity_aggregated_pending._doc: diversity_aggregated root is currently EMPTY on disk. cohort_master_samples + cohort_master_per_chrom layers in layers.registry.json carry disabled: true. See MISSING_DATA.md §3.

raw_results_capture._doc: Where the import_slot runner persists the bytes captured from GET /api/diversity/{slot}. Read by the diversity_slot extractor. action_id is the manifest id; slot is one of embedded_tables / texture_metrics / functional_burden / roh_gene_overlap / divergence_network.

raw_results_harvest._doc: Where the harvest_file runner persists the bytes copied from a master_config-root file. Read by the matching normalizer extractor (extract_genomewide_het_v1, extract_pestpg_v1, extract_tsv_passthrough_v1, ...).
